news.t: The Market May Be Going Nowhere. These Income ETFs Could Benefit.
Madison Investments Expands Actively-Managed ETF Suite with First of Two Fixed-Income Funds

holdings.infoBox: CVRD is an equity ETF with a total of 67 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microchip Technology stock at 5.98%, Archer-Daniels-Midland Company at 4.49%, Amazon.com at 3.96%, Microsoft at 3.93%, and Danaher at 3.89%.

overview.description: The Madison Covered Call ETF (CVRD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund focuses on income generation by investing in US large- and mid-cap stocks that pay dividends, combined with an option writing strategy. The fund is actively managed CVRD was launched on Aug 22, 2023 and is issued by Madison.

data.title: The Market May Be Going Nowhere. These Income ETFs Could Benefit.
data.text: Covered call strategies limit potential gains in exchange for the income they generate.

data.title: Madison Investments Expands Actively-Managed ETF Suite with First of Two Fixed-Income Funds
data.text: MADISON, Wis., Aug. 29, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Madison Investments , an independently-owned investment firm managing $22.9 billion in assets, today announces the launch of the Madison Aggregate Bond...
